folio.label: 126r
folio.l: As hym god woot , ne neuäe shal no moo

note.notetxt: the stem of the A on the left side is a correction of thestem of another letter. Compare with other decorated ascender of for example L, T, etc./ODR/

folio.l: This last lengere , than a ©er or twoo
That I supposed of hi~ , nougút but good
But fynally , thus at the laste it stod
That fortune wolde , that he must twynne
Out of that place , whicú that I was Inne
Where me was woo , that is no questiouö
I can nat make of it , discripciouö
For oo thyngö dar I tellen , boldely
I knowe what is the peyne of detú , ther by
Swicú harm I felt , for he ne mygút byleue
So on a day of me , he tok his leue
So sorweful eke , that I wende verreily
That he had felt , as muchel harm as I
Whan that I herd hi~ speke , & saugú his hewe
But natheles I thougút , he was so trewe
And eke that he repeire , shulde a geyn
Witú Inne a litel tyme , sotú to seyn
And resou~ wolde eke , that he must go
For his honoå , as often happetú so
That I made vertu , of necessite
And toke it wel , syn that it must be
As I best mygút , I hidde fro hi~ my sorwe
And tok hi~ by the hand , Seynt Ioún to borwe
And seide hi~ thus , I am ©owres al
Betú swicú as I to ©ow , haue ben & shal
What he answered , it nedetú nat reherce
Who can seyn bet , than he , and don werse
Whan he hatú al wel seid , than hatú he don
Therfore byhoued hire , a ful longö spon
That shal ete witú the fend , thus herd I seye
So at the laste , he must fortú his weye
And fortú he fleetú , til he come æäe hi~ luste
¢ Whan it come hiö to purpos , for to reste
I trowe that he hadde , thilke text in mynde
That al thyngö , repairyngö to his kynde
Gladetú hi~ self , thus seyn men as I gesse
Men louen of ¸pre kynde , Newfangelnesse
As briddes don , that men in kages fede
For thougú thow nygút & day , take of he~ hede
And strowe here cage , as faire & softe as sylk
And ©eue hem Sugre , hony bred and mylk
ñet rigút a non , as that his dore is vppe
He witú his feet , wol spurne doun his cuppe
And to the wode he wole , & wormes ete
